settings.heading: Our Story: Real People, Real Art.
settings.subheading: Where a 400-year-old tradition meets the modern ritual of mindful making.
settings.artisan_subheading: Each piece from Aurilio Rituals is touched by the hands of a skilled artisan — a woman who has devoted her life to mastering this ancient art.
settings.cta_desc: Explore our kits, choose your canvas, and start stitching your own story.

settings.name: Sunita Devi
settings.bio: 25 years of mastery. Sunita leads our artisan collective, training younger women in this ancient stitch tradition.

settings.name: Meena Kumari
settings.bio: Meena selects every thread in our kits with a master eye — ensuring each palette sings with precision and warmth.

settings.name: Rani Devi
settings.bio: Rani translates her grandmother's motifs into the modern designs that make Aurilio Rituals so distinctive.
